title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: The Godfather
description: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control to his reluctant son.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime with the help of Lt. Jim Gordon and DA Harvey Dent.

title: Pulp Fiction
description: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, and others intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: Schindler's List
description: In German-occupied Poland, industrialist Oskar Schindler saves the lives of more than a thousand Jewish refugees.

title: Inception
description: A thief who enters dreamscapes to steal secrets is given the inverse task of planting an idea.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space to ensure humanity's survival.

title: The Matrix
description: A computer hacker learns the truth about his reality and joins a rebellion against its controllers.

title: Goodfellas
description: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his ups and downs.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
description: A young FBI cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated cannibal killer to catch another serial killer.

title: Forrest Gump
description: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson through the eyes of an Alabama man with an extraordinary life.

title: Fight Club
description: An insomniac office worker forms an underground fight club with a soap salesman.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
description: A young hobbit embarks on a journey to destroy a powerful ring and save Middle-earth.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
description: The fellowship is dispersed and each faces dangers while the war for Middle-earth begins.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
description: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo.

title: Star Wars: A New Hope
description: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Knight to rescue a princess and save the galaxy.

title: The Empire Strikes Back
description: After the rebels are overpowered, Luke begins Jedi training while his friends are hunted by Darth Vader.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: The surviving Avengers take one final stand against Thanos following the events of Infinity War.

title: Titanic
description: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious ill-fated ship.

title: Jurassic Park
description: A pragmatic paleontologist visits a theme park where living dinosaurs have been created from prehistoric DNA.

title: The Lion King
description: Lion cub and future king Simba searches for his identity after the murder of his father.

title: Toy Story
description: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened and jealous when a new spaceman figure becomes the top toy.

title: Finding Nemo
description: After his son is captured, an overprotective clownfish embarks on a journey to bring him home.

title: Up
description: Seventy-eight-year-old Carl Fredricksen travels to Paradise Falls tying thousands of balloons to his house.

title: WALL-E
description: A robot who has spent centuries cleaning a waste-covered Earth falls in love with another robot.

title: The Prestige
description: Two stage magicians engage in competitive one-upmanship in an attempt to create the ultimate stage illusion.

title: Memento
description: A man with short-term memory loss uses notes and tattoos to hunt his wife's murderer.

title: Parasite
description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between wealthy and destitute families.

title: Joker
description: A gritty character study follows the transformation of Arthur Fleck into the Joker.
Two British soldiers race against time to deliver a message that could save 1600 men from a deadly ambush.

title: Whiplash
description: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cutthroat music conservatory where his teacher pushes him to limits.

title: La La Land
description: While navigating their careers in Los Angeles, a pianist and an actress fall in love while establishing themselves.

title: Get Out
description: A Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate where increasingly disturbing secrets emerge.

title: A Quiet Place
description: A family struggles to survive in a post-apocalyptic world inhabited by blind monsters with an acute sense of hearing.

title: Hereditary
description: A grieving family is haunted by tragic and disturbing occurrences after the death of their secretive grandmother.

title: The Sixth Sense
description: A boy who communicates with spirits seeks the help of a disheartened child psychologist.

title: Se7en
description: Two detectives, a rookie and a veteran, hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his modus operandi.

title: Alien
description: After a merchant vessel intercepts a distress signal, the crew is hunted by a deadly creature.

title: Blade Runner 2049
description: Young Blade Runner K discovers a long-buried secret that has the potential to plunge society into chaos.

title: Arrival
description: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien lifeforms after twelve mysterious spacecraft appear around the world.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrant and flees the citadel with a group of female prisoners.

title: John Wick
description: An ex-hit-man comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog and took his car.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
description: The adventures of a legendary hotel concierge and his protégé in the fictional Republic of Zubrowka.

title: Knives Out
description: A detective investigates the death of a patriarch of an eccentric, combative family.

title: Gone Girl
description: With his wife's disappearance having become a media sensation, a man sees the spotlight of suspicion fall on him.

title: Black Swan
description: A committed dancer wins the lead role in a production of Swan Lake only to find herself struggling to maintain her sanity.

title: The Truman Show
description: An insurance salesman discovers his whole life is actually a reality TV show.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
description: When their relationship turns sour, a couple undergoes a medical procedure to have each other erased from their memories.

title: Her
description: In a near future, a lonely writer develops an unlikely relationship with an operating system designed to meet his every need.

title: The Social Network
description: As Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg creates the social networking site that would become Facebook, he is sued by the friends he betrayed.
